title: David Wilcock Dies: UFO Researcher and Author Confirmed Dead Following Colorado Police Investigation
description: UFO researcher and author David Wilcock has died at 53 following a 'mental health crisis' in Boulder, Colorado. Police responded to a call on April 20, where Wilcock reportedly took his own life. US Rep Anna Paulina Luna confirmed the news, leading to widespread tributes for the Ancient Aliens star and disclosure movement figure.

title: The Pentagon released its UFO videos – so I went to the US to chase aliens. This is what I found
description: What is behind the surge in ufology? The recent spike can be traced to the top of the US government, which inspired me to start investigating ... I never gave much thought to aliens beyond Star Wars. I put extraterrestrials and their flying saucers in a box marked “nonsense” long ago, along with political manifestos, loyalty cards , Black Friday, fairies, pixies, elves, ghosts and ghouls. Then, in 2017, the New York Times published an article with the headline “Glowing Auras and ‘Black Money’: The Pentagon’s Mysterious UFO Program”. Apparently, the US government had been chasing UFOs for years. These weren’t the ramblings of the kind of straw-chewing rancher you would see in a sci-fi film; the story was told by a military intelligence officer called Luis Elizondo. He claimed he ran a secret Pentagon programme called the Advanced Aerospace Threat Identification Program (AATIP), which had found evidence that UFOs were flying around military bases, behaving in ways that defied the laws of physics. Continue reading...

title: David Wilcock dead? Rep Anna Paulina Luna shares heartbreaking update on UFO expert
description: UFO expert David Wilcock has reportedly died, US representative Anna Paulina Luna shared, amid speculations surrounding the author.

title: Another UFO Expert Dead? David Wilcock Death Reports From Colorado Spark Concern...
description: A Boulder County death investigation has sparked online rumors linking David Wilcock to the incident, but there is no official confirmation of his death.

title: David Wilcock: Nick Pope, Erich von Däniken's deaths come up amid fears about UFO expert; ‘certainly suspicious’
description: Nick Pope, known for running the UK government's UFO project died earlier this year and David Wilcock's fans brought it up amid fears of the UFO expert's death.
